TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Morris_Almond, title = Morris_Almond, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Morris_Almond} }

S.FORM: Morris Almond sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 2, Morris Almond, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Morris Almond sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 2, Morris Almond, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: morris~ɕ almon* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, morris~ɕ almon*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
